message:
perf(channel,sync,web): #[inline] mpsc/oneshot/semaphore accessors + zero-alloc Response::header_value

- mpsc: #[inline] poll_recv, has_messages, len, is_empty, capacity (both sides)
- oneshot: #[inline] recv, is_ready, is_closed (Receiver + SendPermit)
- semaphore: #[inline] available_permits, max_permits, is_closed, permit count/forget
- Response::header_value: replace Vec collect+sort with iterator min_by (zero allocation)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
